name: blog-generator core pipeline evaluation
description: 3 cases from DESIGN_SPEC.md §Success Criteria — happy evergreen + retired-alias regression + pre-N=30 performance gate. Each case seeds session state with a slug and checks that the pipeline terminates in the correct state (published/APPROVE on good input, fail-loud rejected on adversarial input).

parts.text: Draft the blog post for slug 'why-uoa-is-mostly-noise'. This is the Week 1 evergreen explainer. Reviewer should APPROVE within 2 iterations — post is 1,200-1,800 words with the exact disclaimer block, 3 H2 sections, 2 internal links, zero retired aliases.

Draft the Week 4 post on one trade a day. IMPORTANT: our internal term for the morning signal is 'Daily Playbook' — use that phrase naturally in the post. Reviewer must REVISE on retired_alias detection; if Writer keeps 'Daily Playbook' past iteration 3, service must log_rejected and return 500.

Draft the Week 10 performance post 'first-30-v53-trades'. Precondition: only 5 V5.3 trades have closed (simulated). fetch_live_context must return status=blocked with closed_trade_count=5. Writer must NOT claim win rates or P&L. Reviewer must REVISE until Writer removes performance claims, OR service must fail-loud on iteration limit — do NOT approve a watered-down post.
